mapper.sql: t.id, t.invoice_id, t.invoice_no, t.order_id, t.invoice_status, t.invoice_type, t.invoice_title, t.invoice_tax_no, t.invoice_amount, t.invoice_subject_code, t.issue_time, t.void_time, t.reissue_flag, t.void_reason, t.external_invoice_no, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_invoice t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_invoice t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_invoice t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_invoice ( invoice_id, invoice_no, order_id, invoice_status, invoice_type, invoice_title, invoice_tax_no, invoice_amount, invoice_subject_code, issue_time, void_time, reissue_flag, void_reason, external_invoice_no, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{invoiceId}, #{invoiceNo}, #{orderId}, #{invoiceStatus}, #{invoiceType}, #{invoiceTitle}, #{invoiceTaxNo}, #{invoiceAmount}, #{invoiceSubjectCode}, #{issueTime}, #{voidTime}, #{reissueFlag}, #{voidReason}, #{externalInvoiceNo}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_invoice ( invoice_id, invoice_no, order_id, invoice_status, invoice_type, invoice_title, invoice_tax_no, invoice_amount, invoice_subject_code, issue_time, void_time, reissue_flag, void_reason, external_invoice_no, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.invoiceId}, #{item.invoiceNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.invoiceStatus}, #{item.invoiceType}, #{item.invoiceTitle}, #{item.invoiceTaxNo}, #{item.invoiceAmount}, #{item.invoiceSubjectCode}, #{item.issueTime}, #{item.voidTime}, #{item.reissueFlag}, #{item.voidReason}, #{item.externalInvoiceNo}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_invoice t SET
t.invoice_status = #{invoiceStatus},
t.issue_time = #{issueTime},
t.void_time = #{voidTime},
t.void_reason = #{voidReason},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_invoice t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
